name: Shared Context Engine
description: 跨 Agent 共享上下文引擎 | Cross-agent shared context engine with local file and OpenViking support

agents.description: Per-agent configuration / 每个 Agent 的配置

shared.description: Enable shared context for this agent / 是否启用共享上下文

sources.description: Context sources in priority order / 上下文来源（按优先级排列）

writeTo.description: Write destination (defaults to first source) / 写入目标（默认为第一个来源）

localDir.description: Local shared context directory / 本地共享上下文目录

openviking.description: OpenViking server configuration / OpenViking 服务器配置

compareMode.description: Enable compare mode: generate both shared and non-shared context for comparison / 对比模式：同时生成有/无共享上下文以对比效果

debugLevel.description: Debug logging level / 调试日志级别

maxContextEntries.description: Maximum context entries to keep per agent / 每个 Agent 最大上下文条目数

defaultTokenBudget.description: Default token budget for assembly / 默认 assemble token 预算

sharedBudgetRatio.description: Max ratio of budget for shared context (0-1) / 共享上下文占总预算的最大比例

announceProtectTTL.description: Announce protection TTL in milliseconds / Announce 保护 TTL（毫秒）
